text:
Noko (ノウコ, Nouko) is the only child on Whale Island other than Gon. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 64 

Appearance

Noko is a young girl Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 1 with green eyes and orange hair that she keeps in two braids. She is seen wearing a pink long-sleeved shirt. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 1 (2011) 

Personality

Little is known about Noko's personality. She seems to be a friend of Gon's since she headed down to the docks to greet him when he departed. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

Noko is among those at the front of the crowd when Gon presents the Master of the Swamp to Mito. She is later seen at the docks on the day of Gon's departure from Whale Island, smiling at him. 

Yorknew City arc

Gon mentions Noko to Killua in a conversation while they hang out in the forest of Whale Island. 

Chimera ant arc

When Gon performs the pinky promise with Palm, he recalls that putting their thumbs together and saying a kiss seals the deal is something that he used to do with Mito and Noko. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 20, Chapter 205 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In a 2023 Q&A on the Iwakura and Yoshizumi's Show, Togashi revealed a discarded ending for the series. This ending describes an alternative future in which it is implied that Noko and Gon had married at some point and, eventually, had children together.

Anime and Manga Differences

In the manga, Noko smiles at Gon when he departs, but in the 2011 anime adaptation, she is seen crying. 
Gon does not mention Noko in the 1999 anime adaptation, but her back is seen briefly when Gon brings the Master of the Swamp into the village.

Translations around the World
